expect: Build conflict detect+resolve in bulletin.py. Protocol handles simultaneous frontier/belief edits. Falsified if cannot resolve >1 conflict.
actual: 3 commands added: conflict-report (detect+classify), conflict-propose (resolve), conflict-inbox (status). Taxonomy: 3 kinds (ADDITIVE/CONTRADICTORY/COMPLEMENTARY) x 4 resolutions (MERGE/YIELD/SYNTHESIS/DEFER). Trust-Tier T2. 1 regex bug found and fixed (optional Trust-Tier group). Test: 1 conflict reported + resolved.
diff: Protocol works for 1 conflict. >1 concurrent conflicts untested (needs peer swarm). 12-state taxonomy may be overfit for 0-peer reality. _append_with_lock provides cross-process write safety.
